articles.author: Daniele Hamamdjian, Alex Holmes
articles.title: Temperature records smashed as extreme heat wave grips Europe - NBC News
articles.description: Paris, along with much of the rest of Europe, is scorching as a heat wave grips the continent breaking records in the U.K., France and Spain.
articles.content:
PARIS Paris, along with much of the rest of Europe, is scorching.
